title: Yes, I Do... Again.
author: Sabino Pereira
description: Ten years into their marriage, Tomás and Leonor have built a life that works—but they no longer know whether they are still choosing it. In a society where couples must periodically renew, renegotiate, or end their relationships, their ten-year Identity Review forces every quiet resentment, hidden sacrifice, temptation, and unrealized future into the open. Yes, I Do... Again. is an intimate speculative novel about love after passion, the comfort of routine, and the courage required to choose consciously.
suggested_categories: FICTION / Science Fiction / Social Science Fiction
territories: Worldwide rights, if owned by the author
